The [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] '''Predator I''' was a streamlined [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]]-equipped [[Hyperdrive pod/Legends|pod]] used to transport [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the Viper probe droid is the droid seen in {{Film|V}}, the Predator has different specifications from the [[Probe-Mate hyperspace pod]] mentioned in several other sources.<ref name="DFRSB" /><ref name="TMTSB">''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref> This is considered to be an alternate pod also used with that droid.
